name: Cracker Candy II
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together in a saucepan the condensed milk, margarine and sugar.
2. Bring to a boil and continue boiling for 2 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: peanut butter, crushed saltines, pecans (chopped), and vanilla.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto an oiled cookie sheet.
5. Refrigerate until set.
